notes: v3.0.17: UI sanity pass - dialog header icons removed with centered text-only action names, dialog headers use matching action accent colour, dialog header cards keep subtle gradient and accent underline, dialog Apply/OK/accent buttons use same gradient as Add Action buttons, Image dialog Apply button inherits gradient via QPushButton#accent, bottom panel resized for default window fit, playback buttons/options/progress/stats tightened and aligned, stats chips resized for compact section, check update and menu buttons refreshed with compact icon-button styling.
